task_completion.description: Navigate to the Projects workspace in Nuxeo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo interface shows the user is inside the 'Projects' workspace (e.g., breadcrumbs, sidebar highlight, or title indicating 'Projects').

task_completion.description: Locate and open the 'Project Proposal' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document titled 'Project Proposal' is open in the main view of the Nuxeo interface.

task_completion.description: Open the comments section for the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The comments panel, tab, or dialog is open and visible on the screen for the 'Project Proposal' document.

task_completion.description: Type the requested comment text into the input field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Please review and approve by end of week. Feedback needed on budget section.' is visible inside the Nuxeo comment input box.

task_completion.description: Submit the comment so it is attached to the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The comment 'Please review and approve by end of week. Feedback needed on budget section.' is displayed in the list of submitted/published comments for the document.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Nuxeo.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible with the Nuxeo interface, rather than a terminal window using curl or API scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Nuxeo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches the Nuxeo Platform interface, not a generic text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open or being used to inject the comment text directly into the page's DOM.
